docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CUNNEEN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHEIKH, SHAHEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEIKH, SHAHEEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-01-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHEIKH, SHAHEEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-06-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CUNNEEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED JUL-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHEIKH, SHAHEEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CUNNEEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAHEEN SHEIKH IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES OUT OF STATE DEFENDANT. HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN DENIED THIS CLAIM FOR TRIAL DUE TO IMPROPER JURISDICTION. PLAINTIFF MAY REFILE AND PROCEED IN LIMITED OR UNLIMITED JURISDICTION ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUNNEEN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHEIKH, SHAHEEN
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
